content.full_text:
The Western Union Mailgram is addressed to:

THE FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
428 J ST  
SACRAMENTO CA 95814

The message reads:

DEAR SIR:

RECENTLY I REQUESTED, AND THEN RECEIVED ON 10-19-92 (TODAY), A COPY OF INFORMATION MANUAL F.

SPEAKING AS THE TREASURER OF THE SANTA MONICA REPUBLICAN CLUB (ID 840-249), I DO NOT BELIEVE WE HAVE TO FILE AS A SLATE MAILER ORGANIZATION.

TO MY KNOWLEDGE SINCE I HAVE BEEN CLUB TREASURER, MY CLUB HAS NOT REQUESTED NOR RECEIVED ANY DONATION OF ANY SIZE TO BE USED EITHER DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY FOR A SLATE MAILING FOR THE 1992 ELECTIONS. THE FORMER TREASURER MADE NO MENTION OF THE RECEIPT OF SUCH FUNDS FOR 1992.

THE DECISION TO GENERATE A NOVEMBER, 1992, SLATE MAILER FOLLOWED BY THE AUTHORIZATION OF THE EXPENDITURES OF THEN CURRENT GENERAL TREASURY FUNDS OCCURRED IN LATE SEPTEMBER, 1992 AND ON OCTOBER 8, 1992. NO JUNE, 1992 ELECTION SLATE MAILING OCCURRED.

IF I AM WRONG OR MORE INFORMATION IS REQUESTED, PLEASE CONTACT ME AT MY PERSONAL MAILING ADDRESS OR TELEPHONE NUMBER WHICH ARE:

WILLIAM R TEACHWORTH  
P O BOX 3157  
SANTA MONICA, CA. 90408  
TEL: (310) 394-4698

THANK YOU.

21:25 EST  
MGMCOMP

TO REPLY BY MAILGRAM MESSAGE, PHONE WESTERN UNION ANYTIME, DAY OR NIGHT:

FOR YOUR LOCAL NUMBER, SEE THE WHITE PAGES

OF YOUR LOCAL TELEPHONE DIRECTORY

OR

DIAL (TOLL-FREE) 800-325-6000
